Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl

Class AgentConnectorImpl

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.connect.impl.AbstractConnector<AgentRequest,AgentResponse>
org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl.AgentConnectorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AgentConnector, Connector<AgentRequest>
public class AgentConnectorImpl extends AbstractConnector<AgentRequest,AgentResponse> implements AgentConnector
Core implementation of the LangChain4j agent connector.

Execution flow per invocation:

  1. Instantiate any tool objects listed in toolClasses (fail fast before network I/O).
  2. Resolve the OpenAI-compatible API key from the request parameter or the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.
  3. Resolve the base URL from the request parameter, the OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable, or AgentConnectorConstants.DEFAULT_BASE_URL.
  4. Build an OpenAiChatModel from the request parameters.
  5. Create a stateless AiServices proxy and invoke it with the user message.
  6. Return an AgentResponse containing the output text and a correlation UUID.

    • createChatMemoryProvider

      protected dev.langchain4j.memory.chat.ChatMemoryProvider createChatMemoryProvider(AgentRequest request)
      Factory method — builds the ChatMemoryProvider used when chat memory is active. Each provider call returns a MessageWindowChatMemory bound to the shared AgentChatMemoryStore, so memory survives between connector invocations within the same JVM.

    • createMcpClients

      protected List<dev.langchain4j.mcp.client.McpClient> createMcpClients(AgentRequest request)
      Factory method — override in tests to inject stubbed MCP clients.

      Builds one client per entry of the mcpServers JSON array. Returns an empty list when mcpServers is not configured.

    • buildMcpClient

      protected dev.langchain4j.mcp.client.McpClient buildMcpClient(String url, Map<String,String> headers)
      Factory method for a single MCP client — override in tests to capture arguments and avoid opening a real transport connection.

    • createContentRetriever

      protected dev.langchain4j.rag.content.retriever.ContentRetriever createContentRetriever(AgentRequest request)
      Factory method — builds and returns a ContentRetriever backed by pgvector when pgHost is present in the request, or null to skip RAG entirely. Override in tests to inject a stubbed retriever.

      The returned ContentRetriever wraps the underlying EmbeddingStoreContentRetriever to (a) keep the existing SLF4J logging and (b) emit a type: "retrieval" event into the AgentChatListener active on the calling thread (via ProcessStarterToolContext.getActiveListener()). The retrieval event carries the query, embedding-model identity, the pgvector store coordinates (host/port/database/table/dimension — never the password), the retrieval parameters (maxResults, minScore), and per-chunk {score, content, length, metadata} entries. Query and chunk text are run through AgentChatListener.maybeRedact(String) so they honour the same redactContent opt-in that chat events already respect. On failure the event carries errorClass, message, and a short stack identical in shape to onError — see EU AI Act Art. 10 (data governance) / Art. 12 (record-keeping) / Art. 26 (deployer monitoring).

    • createRagEmbeddingStore

      protected dev.langchain4j.store.embedding.EmbeddingStore<dev.langchain4j.data.segment.TextSegment> createRagEmbeddingStore(AgentRequest request)
      Factory method — builds the pgvector embedding store used as the RAG backend. Override in tests to inject a stubbed store and avoid opening a real database connection.

    • createEmbeddingModel

      protected dev.langchain4j.model.embedding.EmbeddingModel createEmbeddingModel(AgentRequest request)
      Factory method — override in tests to inject a stubbed embedding model. Uses OpenAiEmbeddingModel when embeddingModelName is set on the request, otherwise falls back to the local AllMiniLmL6V2EmbeddingModel.

    • createChatModel

      protected dev.langchain4j.model.chat.ChatModel createChatModel(AgentRequest request, String apiKey, String baseUrl, Map<String,String> customHeaders)
      Factory method — override in tests to inject a stubbed chat model.

      Selects the OpenAI Responses API (OpenAiResponsesChatModel) when reasoningSummary is set on the request — that field is only available on the Responses API. Otherwise builds the standard OpenAiChatModel. reasoningEffort, when present, is forwarded to whichever builder is used.
